name: Avatars
overview: Built-in categorized avatar gallery + user uploads + admin-importable collections.
description: Jellyfin plugin that lets users pick an avatar from a built-in categorized gallery, lets admins upload custom avatars, and supports importing additional collections from external URLs (ZIP, GitHub repos, manifest JSON). Fork of cedev-1/jellyfin-plugin-GetAvatar with the kalibrado/jf-avatars catalog embedded.
